name: Aniseed Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and flour baking sheets.
2. Beat egg yolks, powdered sugar, and salt in a large bowl until pale and creamy.
3. Beat egg whites until very stiff; fold into egg yolk mixture.
4. Sift flour, baking powder, and aniseed onto egg mixture; fold in quickly but thoroughly.
5. Fill a pastry bag fitted with a plain nozzle with cookie mixture.
6. Pipe small rounds onto prepared baking sheets.
7. Let stand overnight to dry out.
8. Preheat oven to 325°F.
9. Bake cookies for 20 minutes.
10. Cool on rack.
